title: Check Whether Patches Require Reboot
stdout:
::fixture-ready::
$ cat /var/run/reboot-required.pkgs
linux-image-6.8.0-63-generic
libc6
::exit-code::0
$ test -f /var/run/reboot-required && printf 'reboot-required\n' && cat /var/run/reboot-required.pkgs
reboot-required
linux-image-6.8.0-63-generic
libc6
::exit-code::0
